hooks.command: file="$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH"; if [ -n "$file" ]; then case "$file" in *.py) cd /Users/marcelogomesmarques/Projects/CloudeCode/radiocalico && source api/venv/bin/activate && ruff check "$file" --quiet 2>&1 || true ;; *.js) cd /Users/marcelogomesmarques/Projects/CloudeCode/radiocalico && npx eslint "$file" --quiet 2>&1 || true ;; esac; fi

echo 'Context was compacted. Reminders: (1) Run make ci before committing. (2) Run make lint after editing code. (3) Do NOT start the web server in foreground — it blocks. (4) Hard refresh (Cmd+Shift+R) after static file edits. (5) All API routes use /api prefix. (6) Detailed rules in .claude/rules/'
